decisions.title: Prioritize Canvas Disposition History vs Pass/Fail Buttons
decisions.context: Both ENG-9828 (disposition history/comments) and ENG-9437 (pass/fail buttons) are Canvas improvements targeting 'Embed Deeper' pillar. Need to sequence for maximum decision capture impact.

arguments.for: Pass/fail buttons enable immediate decision capture; disposition history enables audit trail for regulatory customers
arguments.against: History/comments may have longer implementation cycle; buttons alone don't capture decision rationale

decisions.title: FedRAMP Compliance Scope: GNA vs Full Platform
decisions.context: ENG-9664, ENG-9661, ENG-9662 indicate FedRAMP work across GNA and Amplitude surfaces. Unclear if this blocks other product work or requires dedicated resourcing.
decisions.blockedBy: Requirements gathering incomplete; timeline impact on Canvas/Explore V2 roadmap unclear

arguments.for: FedRAMP opens government/defense sector; aligns with 'Build the Moat' via compliance differentiation
arguments.against: Major engineering investment may delay core product roadmap; unclear customer pipeline

decisions.title: SCIM User Management: Block vs Redirect Flow
decisions.context: ENG-9784/9785 block deactivation and email invites for SCIM orgs. Need to decide on graceful degradation vs hard blocks to maintain user experience.

arguments.for: Hard blocks prevent data inconsistencies; clear error messaging protects admin workflows
arguments.against: May surprise existing SCIM customers; need migration communication plan

decisions.title: E2 Metrics Relative Time Compare: Ship or Defer
decisions.context: ENG-7748 adds relative time compare mode to Explore V2. Unclear if this is critical for 'Nail the Core' or nice-to-have feature creep.

arguments.for: Comparative analysis drives faster decisions; competitor parity feature
arguments.against: May distract from core Explore V2 performance/stability work; unclear customer demand signal

decisions.title: Test Results KPI Dashboard: MVP Scope Definition
decisions.context: ENG-9836 RFC for Test Results KPI dashboard. Need to define MVP metrics that ladder to 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' north star.

arguments.for: Dashboard enables data-driven prioritization; surfaces adoption bottlenecks early
arguments.against: Internal tooling vs customer-facing features trade-off; risk of vanity metrics

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy compliance/infra week: 40% of eng capacity on FedRAMP, SCIM, FIPS work vs 35% on product features. Canvas disposition work started but pass/fail buttons stalled pending design review.
alerts: 5 decisions awaiting resolution; 2 blocked by missing requirements
FedRAMP scope creep risk: 3 teams now involved, no consolidated roadmap
Explore V2 performance regression: ENG-8756 scrolling bug may impact Q2 launch
Canvas momentum strong but designer capacity constraint on DES-61/DES-134
